description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines two stages, build-app and build-image. In the build-app stage add a job named "build app" using the node:12 Docker image, caching the node_modules directory, and producing artifacts of the .next and build directories that expire after one day; the job runs the commands "yarn", "yarn lint", and "yarn build". In the build-image stage add a job named "build image" using the docker:latest image with the docker:19.03.5-dind service, which runs "docker info", logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD via stdin, attempts to pull existing images, builds a new image with "--cache-from" for the current branch and master and "--shm-size 512M", pushes the image tagged with $CI_COMMIT_SHA, tags it with $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG, and pushes the tag. No additional rules or only/except conditions are defined.
